prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-SOLSPN-YJJ-75495-72-FBA Product Type: SPOON Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille Grey Nylon Spoon with Wooden Handle Kitchen Utensils High Heat Resistance, 13 Inch Description: Want to step up your cooking, baking and meal prep game? Then you need the Beille nylon solid spoon that features a stylish wood and charcoal grey finish. These kitchen utensils are made with high heat resistant nylon that will stand up to all the wear and tear your kitchen can dish out.

The solid spoon features sturdy handles made of durable wood so you can count on them to last, and the ergonomic handle design with top soft grip will provide comfort and help prevent slippage during use. The handle features a slot for easy hanging storage if preferred to drawer storage.

Every kitchen needs a reliable, durable solid spoon for baking, serving and cooking. With the Beille high heat resistance nylon spoon, you can cook, bake, serve and food prep in comfort and style for many meals to come. Search Terms: kitchen utensils set cooking baking supplies tools food meal prep slotted spoons kitchen starter set scoop serveware wedding house warming gifts new home college dorm room essentials chef restaurant equipment server nylon Features: - ESSENTIAL KITCHEN SPOON: This Beille spoon is a must have kitchen tool for cooking, baking and food prep; Large wooden handle with a broad spatula base will quickly and safely turn food while cooking and keep your hands safe from heat - HIGH HEAT RESISTANT NYLON: Solid spoon is made of durable nylon which does not cause harmful chemical contamination of food; the kitchen utensils can withstand very high cooking temperatures and are food safe - ERGONOMIC WOODEN HANDLE: Sturdy handle made of durable wood so you can count on it to last and ergonomic handle provides comfort during use; Comes with handy slot in handle for easy hang storage if preferred; Trendy grey color will fit nicely with any kitchen decor - DISHWASHER SAFE: All tools included are dishwasher safe and safe for use with both hot and cold foods - SPECIFICATIONS: Colors: grey, brown wood; Material: nylon, brown wood; Dimensions: 13 x 3.2 inches === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
